calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: T. Paxton.
Petitioner: Edwin Soria, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Myrna Soria Benardo and further orders the gender changed from Male to Female.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-17-2007 Reset To May-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Scott Hughes.
Petitioner: Edwin Soria, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Declaration of R. Nick Gorton, MD. dtd. Apr. 12, 2007 rec'd and filed in court.
Matter is continued to May 10, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for Medical Declaration under penalty of perjury by a physician.
No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Reset To Apr-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Brenda Field.
Petitioner: Edwin Soria, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
Without medical declaration by a physician under penalty of perjury, matter is continued to April 17, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
